falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top, contradicting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting a reversal rather than a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical bottom pattern would falsify the current analysis, indicating the setup is no longer valid.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
